decision: Issue 7 (daax-web #73): add GET /api/mcp/status route that reads MCP server names in priority order: (1) /workspace/.mcp.json (container) or cwd/.mcp.json (host) — authoritative when file exists (even if invalid/empty); (2) getHomeMcpJsonPath() from lib/mcp-config.ts (HOME_MCP_JSON || ~/.mcp.json); (3) Claude Desktop config (CLAUDE_DESKTOP_CONFIG || macOS Library path || Linux ~/.config/claude/ path). Supports both mcpServers and servers keys. Type-guards values. Sets Cache-Control: no-store. Returns {servers:string[]} always at HTTP 200. McpStatusBar component fetches route with cache:no-store, re-fetches on visibilitychange, guards servers with Array.isArray; renders chips or empty state 'No MCP servers configured'. Mount above agent launcher grid in app/ai-coding/page.tsx.
rejected: discoverAllMcps() full parity (codex rev4-rev5): unbounded; Copilot reviews on PRs #76-#81 addressed real correctness issues without the full discoverAllMcps complexity.
evidence: 19 tests all pass (15 route + 4 component); typecheck clean; lint 0 errors; format clean on all new files. Copilot PRs #76 (4), #77 (3), #78 (2), #79 (3), #80 (3), #81 (4) all addressed.
note: Pre-existing prettier warnings on TerminalManager.tsx, host-docker.ts, backlog-tasks-route.test.ts left — out of scope.
